data.title: Luigi Mangione Lands In Same Brooklyn Jail As Diddy And FTX's Bankman-Fried
data.description: The alleged murderer of UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson has been transferred to the Metropolitan Detention Center in Brooklyn, New York.
